mapper.sql: s.support_seq AS supportSeq, s.category_code AS categoryCode, s.title, s.content, s.link_url AS linkUrl, s.sort_order AS sortOrder, s.show_yn AS showYn, DATE_FORMAT(s.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt, DATE_FORMAT(s.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt, s.create_id AS createId, s.modify_id AS modifyId, s.create_ip AS createIp, s.modify_ip AS modifyIp
s.support_seq AS supportSeq, s.category_code AS categoryCode, s.title, s.content, s.link_url AS linkUrl, s.sort_order AS sortOrder, s.show_yn AS showYn

ORDER BY
s.category_code s.sort_order s.create_dt s.modify_dt s.title s.support_seq
ASC DESC
, s.support_seq DESC
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM site_support s WHERE s.support_seq = #{supportSeq} AND s.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT
FROM site_support s WHERE s.use_yn = 'Y' AND s.show_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY FIELD(s.category_code, 'AD', 'SPONSOR', 'HELPER'), s.sort_order ASC, s.support_seq DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE site_support SET category_code = #{categoryCode}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, link_url = #{linkUrl}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, show_yn = #{showYn}, modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE support_seq = #{supportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE site_support SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE support_seq = #{supportSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
